dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace shows 100% compliance with governance protocols. Every reasoning span, including the critical 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine', achieved 'schema_validation_success'. This indicates that the agent is operating strictly within the defined semantic contracts.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span demonstrates extraordinary depth, processing 22,305 prompt tokens and generating 65,058 completion tokens. This suggests a highly detailed causal mapping of work items to architectural evolution states, far exceeding the baseline complexity.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Tension resolution is handled sequentially through the 'alignment-engine' and 'architecture-intent-generator'. The transition from mapping to alignment to intent indicates a structured approach to identifying and resolving trade-offs before final intent is committed.
